idea-plugin.name: Rite Language
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for Rite ceremony files (*.rite.yaml), powered by a bundled language server.

  • Diagnostics (errors and warnings)
  • Hover information
  • Completions

Rite is a DSL and runtime for cryptographic key ceremonies. Learn more at ritely.io.

The plugin bundles the rite-ls binary for macOS (Apple Silicon and Intel), Linux (x64 and ARM64), and Windows (x64). A custom binary can be configured under Settings | Languages & Frameworks | Rite.
